items.title: RT by @POTUS: "Most importantly, we have a deal that Iran will never have a nuclear weapon." - President Donald J. Trump 🇺🇸

items.title: US Breakevens Should Be Higher: Dhingra
items.summary: Nisha Patel, SMA fixed income portfolio manager at Parametric, and Guneet Dhingra, head of US rates strategy at BNP Paribas join Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Real Yield." US producer prices rose in May at the fastest pace in more than three years as the fallout from the Iran war continued to fan inflation pressures.  (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Opec cuts oil demand outlook for this year again as Iran war disrupts markets
The Iran war is testing the limits of India’s economic resilience
items.summary: Modi will need to combine emergency measures with reforms to help the country rebound

items.title: US Stocks Soar as Trump Says He’s Called Off New Iran Strikes
items.summary: US stocks rose to session highs following two straight losing days, as President Donald Trump said he’s called off planned military strikes on Iran, hours after threatening to escalate the three-month war.

items.title: Trafigura and Vitol Sell More Venezuelan Oil to Asia as War Roils Supply
items.summary: Commodity traders Trafigura Group and Vitol Group are expanding efforts to sell Venezuelan oil into Asia, a move that comes as the South American country’s production rises and the Iran war disrupts competing supplies from the Middle East.

items.title: Vanguard Energy ETF or VanEck Uranium and Nuclear ETF : Which is a Smarter Bet Right now ?
Deadly Sudan drone strike targets funeral procession
items.summary: Rights groups accuse the RSF paramilitary group of killing civilians in el-Obeid, a city on the civil war's front line.

items.title: Taking Kharg Island 'Very Doable' For US Forces in MidEast, Says Rebecca Grant
items.summary: Rebecca Grant, senior fellow and vice president for defense programs at the Lexington Institute, said that the US is better positioned to take over Kharg Island than it was at the start of the war and that it is 'very doable' for the forces central command has in the region. Grant said that because the US has air dominance in the region and controls all of the ways of approach, there would not nee

items.title: Trump Says Deal With Iran Could Be Signed Within Days
items.summary: President Donald Trump says a deal to end the war with Iran could be signed within days. “We just made a great settlement of the war with Iran, and we’re going to be subject to finalization of documents, we should get done over the next few days,” Trump said. Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld report.  (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Dollar Drops the Most in a Month as Trump Says the War Is Ending
items.summary: The dollar fell by the most in more than a month as President Donald Trump’s vow of progress on a deal to end the war with Iran eased demand for the haven.

items.title: Oil Extends Decline After Trump Says US Nearing Deal With Iran
items.summary: Oil extended declines after President Donald Trump said a peace deal with Iran could be signed as soon as the weekend following two days of US military strikes that cast doubt over progress to end the war.

items.title: Japanese Stocks Set to Rise on Optimism Over Middle East War
items.summary: Japanese stocks are poised to rise after President Donald Trump signaled the US is close to signing a deal with Iran, boosting investor confidence.

items.title: Gold Holds Gain as Trump Signals Imminent Peace Deal With Iran
items.summary: Gold held its biggest gain since March after President Donald Trump said the US could sign a deal with Iran over the weekend to end the war that’s rattled global markets and stoked inflation.

items.title: The Iran conflict and the potential collapse of the  Greater Israel  vision - On Line Opinion
Korea’s Kospi Surges 8% as Iran Deal Hopes Lift Chip Stocks
items.summary: South Korean stocks jumped as risk appetite improved after President Donald Trump said the US was nearing an agreement with Iran to end the war.

items.title: Asia energy crisis at ‘worst’ case scenario, ADB warns
items.summary: Multilateral lender says 15 countries have requested $4bn in emergency support due to war in Iran

items.title: Copper Rallies From Three-Week Low as Trump Flags Iran Deal
items.summary: Copper rebounded from its lowest close since mid-May after President Donald Trump claimed the US was on the cusp of ending the war with Iran that’s threatening the global economy.

items.title: ECB Hike 'Just Enough For Now,' Says Slovenian Central Bank Governor
items.summary: The European Central Bank has hiked interest rates for the first time since September 2023 — becoming the first major central bank to react to the war in Iran. ECB Governing Council Member and Slovenia Central Bank Governor Primož Dolenc says the move is “just enough for now.” Dolenc spoke to Bloomberg's Oliver Crook in an exclusive interview just after the decision on Thursday. (Source: Blo
